generation_rule: Generate the literal product of the eight registered Cryptography and Computational Security structural axes for publicly checkable source authorization.
grammar_boundary: All generated finite publicly checkable source authorization structures whose carriers, relations, traces and interfaces are composed from admitted Foundation, Mathematics and Information Science forms. No number-theoretic hardness assumption is imported; any computational claim states its resource boundary.
